claims.claim: 2026 first-home (dira yechida) purchase-tax brackets: 0% up to 1,978,745, 3.5% to 2,347,040, 5% to 6,055,070, 8% to 20,183,565, 10% above 20,183,565 NIS / 20,183,565 ש"ח. The older 12% bracket above 20,183,565 was dropped (top is now 10%).
2026 non-first / investment apartment purchase tax: 8% from the first shekel up to 6,055,070, then 10% above 6,055,070.
claims.raw_snippet: דירה שנייה ומעלה: 8% עד 6,055,070 ש"ח ו-10% מעל

claims.claim: New immigrant (oleh) single-home purchase tax under reformed Regulation 12a (תקנה 12א, from 15.8.2024): 0% to 1,978,745, 0.5% to 6,055,070, 8% to 20,183,565. The relief has a VALUE CEILING: if the home is worth more than 20,183,565 NIS, Regulation 12a does not apply at all and the ordinary brackets tax the full price. Once only, single residential home, from one year before to seven years after aliyah.
claims.raw_snippet: בדירה ששוויה מעל סכום זה, ההקלה שבתקנה 12א לא תחול

claims.claim: Worked example for a 2.5M first home: 0% on the first 1,978,745 + 3.5% on 368,295 (to 2,347,040) + 5% on the remaining 152,960 = 20,538 NIS / 20,538 ש"ח, an effective rate of about 0.82%.
Bank of Israel maximum mortgage loan-to-value (LTV): 75% for a first / sole home, 70% for a replacement (upgrade) home, 50% for an investment / additional property.
claims.raw_snippet: לדירה ראשונה עד 75% מימון, משפר דיור עד 70%, דירה להשקעה עד 50%

claims.claim: Online Land Registry (Tabu) extract fees: a regular online extract about 15 NIS / 15 ש"ח, a historical extract about 74 NIS / 74 ש"ח, a consolidated extract about 131 NIS / 131 ש"ח.
claims.raw_snippet: נסח רגיל עולה 15 ש"ח, נסח היסטורי עולה 74 ש"ח, נסח מרוכז עולה 131 ש"ח

claims.claim: Betterment tax (heitel hashbacha) under the Third Schedule of the Planning and Building Law is 50% of the rise in property value caused by a planning action; the local authority may reduce it to 25% or grant a full exemption in defined cases (urban renewal, Tama 38, rehabilitation neighborhoods).
claims.raw_snippet: גובה היטל ההשבחה הוא מחצית (50%) מעליית שווי המקרקעין

claims.claim: Customary buyer's attorney fee for an apartment purchase is about 0.5% of the price plus VAT (varies, higher on lower-priced deals).
claims.raw_snippet: שכר הטרחה הממוצע הוא כ-0.5% בתוספת מע"מ

claims.claim: Customary real-estate brokerage fee on an apartment sale is 2% plus VAT (range 1-2% + VAT).
claims.raw_snippet: עמלת התיווך הנפוצה ביותר היא 2% פלוס מע"מ

claims.claim: The Land Registry (Tabu) online extract service is at gov.il land_registration_extract.
claims.raw_snippet: נסח רישום

claims.claim: Israel Tax Authority real-estate tax (mas rechisha) simulator page.
claims.raw_snippet: מס ברכישת מקרקעין

claims.claim: Israel Land Authority (Rami) department page.
claims.raw_snippet: רשות מקרקעי ישראל

claims.claim: Nadlan (Tax Authority) historical residential transaction prices.
claims.raw_snippet: עסקאות

claims.claim: Discounted housing (Dira BeHanacha) program landing page.
claims.raw_snippet: דירה בהנחה

claims.claim: Ministry of Justice land-registry extract production portal.
claims.raw_snippet: נסח

claims.claim: Mas shevach (land-appreciation / capital-gains tax) on the sale of Israeli real estate is 25% on the real gain, after deducting the CPI-linked inflation component and allowable expenses (purchase tax, agent and lawyer fees, improvements).
claims.raw_snippet: מס שבח מקרקעין מוטל בשיעור 25% על השבח הריאלי במכירת זכות במקרקעין, לאחר ניכוי מרכיב האינפלציה וההוצאות המותרות.

claims.claim: Linear exemption: for a residential home bought before 1 January 2014, the portion of the gain attributable to the period before that date is exempt and only the portion from 1 January 2014 onward is taxed at 25% (split linearly by holding period); the linear benefit is legislated to be phased out from 2030.
claims.raw_snippet: חישוב מס שבח לינארי: לדירת מגורים שנרכשה לפני 1.1.2014, השבח שנצבר עד מועד זה פטור, והשבח מ-1.1.2014 ואילך חייב במס בשיעור 25%.

claims.claim: Section 49b(2) single-residence exemption: a seller who owns a single residential home held at least 18 months can be fully exempt from mas shevach on the sale, subject to a value ceiling of 5,008,000 NIS (frozen until 15 January 2028); gain attributable to value above the ceiling is taxed. One exempt sale is generally available every 18 months.
claims.raw_snippet: פטור ממס שבח במכירת דירת מגורים יחידה לפי סעיף 49ב(2), בכפוף לתקרת שווי של 5,008,000 ש"ח, מכירה פטורה אחת כל 18 חודשים.

claims.claim: The 8%/10% additional-home purchase-tax rates are a temporary order (hora'at sha'a) in force through 31 December 2026, using tier amounts frozen at 16 January 2024, and are due for re-legislation.
claims.raw_snippet: מס רכישה על דירה נוספת בשיעור 8% ו-10% נקבע בהוראת שעה שבתוקף עד 31 בדצמבר 2026.

claims.claim: Regulation 11 reduced purchase-tax track for disabled persons, the blind, terror/hostility victims, and bereaved families: 0.5% on the portion up to a periodically-updated CPI-linked threshold and 5% above it, on a single residential home, available up to twice in a lifetime.
claims.raw_snippet: הנחה במס רכישה לפי תקנה 11 לנכה, עיוור, נפגע פעולות איבה ומשפחה שכולה: 0.5% עד סף המתעדכן ו-5% מעליו, עד פעמיים בחיים.
